goal_label: Apply practically — solve real LeetCode/interview problems confidently
background_label: Some exposure — seen sorting/arrays but haven't practiced systematically
time_label: 1 hour — deep dives with practice problems

implications.lesson_depth: intermediate — explain the why behind each template, include worked examples with complexity analysis
implications.lesson_length: long-form (800–1200 words per lesson) with pattern recognition cues
implications.flashcard_density: high — one card per operation, per template step, per gotcha
implications.assessment_difficulty: medium — mix of recognition and recall; include complexity analysis questions
implications.pacing: 1 lesson per session; 6–8 sessions per module
